## What does this PR do?

Brief description of the change.

## Related Issue

Closes #___

## Type of Change

- [ ] `feat` — New feature
- [ ] `fix` — Bug fix
- [ ] `docs` — Documentation update
- [ ] `refactor` — Code refactoring
- [ ] `chore` — Maintenance / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] I followed the [commit convention](CONTRIBUTING.md#commit-convention)
- [ ] I tested `sddk --help` and `sddk --version`
- [ ] I updated `plugin.json` if skills were added/removed
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` (if user-facing change)
